name: Exclusion of Tax Refunds from Benefit Eligibility Calculations

eligibility.description: Applies to any individual receiving a tax refund or advance credit payment who is also applying for or receiving benefits from federal, state, or local programs (e.g., SNAP, Medicaid, SSI).

description: Tax refunds and advance payments of refundable credits are excluded from income and resource tests for 12 months when determining eligibility for federal or federally-assisted programs.
